title: sunhangia elegans var. elegans
intro: Sunhangia elegans var. elegans, also known as the Japanese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Sunhangia elegans var. elegans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
